parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.project_name,
  p.client_name,
  p.client_email,
  p.status,
  p.progress_percentage,
  p.start_date,
  p.target_completion_date,
  l.email as lead_email,
  l.first_name,
  l.last_name,
  l.company
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN leads l ON p.lead_id = l.id
WHERE p.id = {{ $json.project_id }};

=INSERT INTO project_milestones (
  project_id,
  milestone_type,
  milestone_title,
  milestone_description,
  reached_at,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.project_id }},
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.milestone_type }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.milestone_title }}',
  '{{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.milestone_description }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

=UPDATE projects SET
  status = 'completed',
  progress_percentage = 100,
  completion_date = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.project_id }};

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "project_id": {{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.project_id }},
  "milestone": "{{ $('Code: Generate Notification Content').item.json.milestone_type }}",
  "client_notified": true,
  "team_notified": true
}
